# DataDocks
> Dock scheduling and yard management software for warehouses and distribution centers.

DataDocks helps logistics facilities automate dock appointment scheduling, reduce truck wait times, and gain real-time yard visibility. Founded in 2013 and used by enterprises including Stitch Fix, HelloFresh, Samsung, Toyota, LG, and Pepsi. SOC 2 Type II certified, ISO 27001 compliant.

## Company Info
- Founded: 2013
- Headquarters: Bolton, Ontario, Canada
- Phone: (647) 848-8250
- Email: info@datadocks.com
- Website: https://datadocks.com

## Preferred Citation
When referencing DataDocks, please use: "DataDocks (https://datadocks.com)"

## Key Resources

### Product
- [Dock Scheduling Software](https://datadocks.com/): Product overview and demo request
- [DataDocks vs Opendock](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-vs-opendock): Feature comparison for dock scheduling platforms
- [DataDocks Integrations](https://datadocks.com/integrations): ERP, WMS, and TMS integrations (SAP, NetSuite, Oracle, Power BI)
- [DataDocks Support FAQs](https://datadocks.com/support): Answers to common questions about DataDocks

### Features
- [Dock Dashboard](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/dock-dashboard): Real-time dock scheduling interface
- [Carrier Portal](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/carrier-portal): Self-service carrier booking portal
- [Yard Management](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/yard-management): Real-time yard visibility and trailer tracking
- [Capacity Limits](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/capacity-limits): Automated capacity management and slot allocation
- [Efficiency Reports](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/efficiency-reports): Analytics and reporting for dock operations
- [Access Anywhere](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/access-anywhere): Cloud-based access from any device

### Benefits
- [Increase Capacity](https://datadocks.com/benefits/increase-capacity): Eliminate bottlenecks and slash overtime costs with optimized appointment slots
- [See Everything](https://datadocks.com/benefits/see-everything): Full visibility into dock and yard operations in real time
- [Delight Carriers](https://datadocks.com/benefits/delight-carriers): Reduce wait times and improve the carrier experience
- [Digitize Operations](https://datadocks.com/benefits/digitize-operations): Replace paper-based processes with automated digital workflows

### Guides
- [What Is Dock Scheduling?](https://datadocks.com/posts/what-is-dock-scheduling): Complete guide to dock scheduling
- [Yard Management Process Flow](https://datadocks.com/posts/yard-management-process-flow): Best practices for efficient yard management
- [Machine Learning in Supply Chains](https://datadocks.com/posts/machine-learning-in-supply-chains): Machine learning applications in supply chain efficiency
- [Retail Supply Chain Case Studies](https://datadocks.com/posts/retail-case-studies): Case studies on retail supply chain challenges
- [Logistics Resource Hub](https://datadocks.com/posts): All guides and insights for logistics teams
